# Contract Compiler Promotion Decision

- Generated compiler candidate:
- Hand-written comparison fixture:
- Semantic diff artifact:

## Review-Only Diff Decision

- Source mode difference accepted: yes / no / request changes
- Additive health check difference accepted: yes / no / request changes
- Boundary wording difference accepted: yes / no / request changes
- Rationale:

## Decision

Decision: approve / reject / request changes

Reviewer:

Date:

Rationale:

## Boundary Confirmation

This decision does not by itself:

- execute AI;
- apply graph deltas;
- accept product work;
- enable required checks;
- configure branch protection;
- introduce CI enforcement;
- retire tree-native artifacts;
- widen supported `changeType` values;
- make compiler output authoritative beyond the approved scope.
